parameters.subject: Friendly Reminder — Documents Outstanding | {{ $json.client_name }}
parameters.html:
Prudentia Digital

Hi {{ $json.client_name }},

We hope this finds you well. We noticed that we're still waiting on your documents to get started on your {{ $json.service }} engagement.

Awaiting since: {{ $json.intake_date }}
Documents needed: Company registration docs, current process overview, and list of existing tools.

Please reply to this email with your documents attached, or let us know if you need help preparing them.

Warm regards,
The Prudentia Digital Team

Prudentia Digital (Pty) Ltd · Gauteng, South Africa
This is an automated reminder related to your active engagement.
To opt out of these reminders, reply with STOP or click here. Processing of your information is in accordance with POPIA. View our PAIA Manual.

notes:
